blended.narrative: Silver Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 3,598 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 5" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: light rain showers, highs of 56°F.

recent_conditions.narrative: 16.8" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 4" over the past week. Current depth: 37".
